subcodes.first_line: Praise lamenteth, saying: "Verily, I am unworthy of Him Who cannot be described in speech nor portrayed through parables and praise." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینوح الحمد و یقول انی لست اهلا لمن لایوصف بالمقال و لایذکر بالامثال و الثناء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
